sequence if exists emp_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists goal_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists holiday_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists leave_balance_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists pr_seq Hibernate: create sequence announce_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence att_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence audit_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence emp_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence goal_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence holiday_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence leave_balance_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence pr_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create table announcement (is_active boolean, announcement_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by bigint, title varchar(200) not null, content varchar(3000) not null, primary key (announcement_id)) Hibernate: create table attendance (date_col date not null, att_id bigint not null, employee_id bigint not null, status enum ('ABSENT','HOLIDAY','LEAVE','PRESENT') not null, primary key (att_id), unique (employee_id, date_col)) Hibernate: create table audit_log (action_time timestamp(6) not null, entity_id bigint, log_id bigint not null, performed_by bigint not null, entity_type varchar(50), action varchar(300) not null, primary key (log_id)) Hibernate: create table department (dept_id bigint generated by default as identity, dept_name varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (dept_id)) Hibernate: create table designation (desig_id bigint generated by default as identity, desig_name varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (desig_id)) Hibernate: create table employee (joining_date date, salary float(53), dept_id bigint, desig_id bigint, employee_id bigint not null, manager_id bigint, phone varchar(20), email varchar(150) not null unique, name varchar(150) not null, emergency_contact varchar(200), security_answer varchar(200), security_question varchar(200), address varchar(300), password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','EMPLOYEE','MANAGER') not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (employee_id)) Hibernate: create table goal (deadline date, progress_percent integer, employee_id bigint not null, goal_id bigint not null, review_id bigint, goal_description varchar(1000) not null, manager_comments varchar(1000), priority enum ('HIGH','LOW','MEDIUM') not null, status enum ('COMPLETED','IN_PROGRESS','NOT_STARTED') not null, primary key (goal_id)) Hibernate: create table holiday (holiday_date date not null unique, holiday_id bigint not null, holiday_name varchar(150) not null, primary key (holiday_id)) Hibernate: create table leave_application (from_date date not null, to_date date not null, applied_on timestamp(6), employee_id bigint not null, leave_id bigint generated by default as identity, manager_id bigint, manager_comments varchar(500), reason varchar(500), leave_type enum ('CASUAL_LEAVE','PAID_LEAVE','SICK_LEAVE') not null, status enum ('APPROVED','CANCELLED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (leave_id)) Hibernate: create table leave_balance (casual_leave integer not null, paid_leave integer not null, sick_leave integer not null, employee_id bigint not null unique, leave_balance_id bigint not null, primary key (leave_balance_id)) Hibernate: create table notification (is_read boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), employee_id bigint not null, notification_id bigint generated by default as identity, ref_id bigint, message varchar(500) not null, type enum ('GENERAL','GOAL_ASSIGNED','LEAVE_APPLIED','LEAVE_APPROVED','LEAVE_REJECTED','REVIEW_FEEDBACK','REVIEW_SUBMITTED'), primary key (notification_id)) Hibernate: create table performance_review (manager_rating integer, review_year integer not null, self_rating integer, employee_id bigint not null, review_id bigint not null, accomplishments varchar(2000), areas_of_improvement varchar(2000), key_deliverables varchar(2000), manager_feedback varchar(2000), status enum ('DRAFT','REVIEWED','SUBMITTED'), primary key (review_id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists announcement add constraint FKmx7fe5b77pn308q71gto6ulmy foreign key (created_by) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists attendance add constraint FKr7q0h8jfngkyybll6o9r3h9ua foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists audit_log add constraint FK6c8hqvbha67ittqceq7d15jq8 foreign key (performed_by) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists employee add constraint
